feed.title: Just another software blog
feed.subtitle: Just another blog of ramblings from a software developer

entry.title: What a wonderful world.
entry.summary: My name is Jason Scherer and welcome to my little world on the internet.To begin on my journey into computers, electronics, and finally programming. My journey started very early in life, so shall we begin? Electronics and Computers I started at an early age, maybe 8-10 years old if not younger, taking apart electronics that my grandpa would bring home from his work that may or may not be in ...
